summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Earl's Landscaping lead generation funnel website. All core features working correctly including form submission, navigation, and responsive design.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with all sections (Hero, Services, Testimonials, Service Area, Footer)
Lead capture form displays with all required fields (name, email, phone, service type)
Service dropdown shows all 4 options (Lawn Care, Garden Planting, Hardscaping, Full Service)
Form submission works correctly - POST /api/leads endpoint returns success
Success message appears after form submission with correct text
Navigation links work properly (Services, Testimonials, Service Area)
Testimonials section displays with correct 4.8 rating and 6 testimonial cards
Service area map section shows Hamilton HQ pin and GTA coverage areas
Email validation properly rejects invalid emails with 422 status
All service area locations displayed (Hamilton, Burlington, Oakville, Mississauga, etc.)
Trust badges display correctly (4.8 Star Rating, Fully Insured, Same Week Service)
